title: demo-builder config
description: Configuration for demo-builder. Timecodes: MM:SS.mmm or HH:MM:SS.mmm.

topics.title: Topics
topics.description: Ordered list of scenes. The final video is their concatenation.

DefaultConfig.title: DefaultConfig
DefaultConfig.description: Default source files and output settings.

audio_file.title: Audio File
audio_file.description: Main audio file. All topic timecodes reference this file by default.

video_file.title: Video File
video_file.description: Main screen recording. Used by topics with type=video unless overridden per-topic.

resolution.title: Resolution
resolution.description: Output frame size [width, height]. Required when all topics use images (no video to probe). Optional otherwise — auto-detected from the first video file.

DefaultNorm.title: DefaultNorm
DefaultNorm.description: Global fallback normalization methods applied to every topic unless overridden.

Topic.title: Topic
Topic.description: One scene: one audio segment + one video clip or static image.

name.title: Name
name.description: Unique scene name. Used in logs and mp4 chapter metadata.

AudioSource.title: AudioSource
AudioSource.description: Audio segment to extract for this topic.

file.title: File
file.description: Audio file override for this topic. Falls back to default_configuration.audio_file.

timing.title: Timing
timing.description: [start, end] timecodes into the audio file.

VideoSource.title: VideoSource
VideoSource.description: Video clip or static image for this topic.

typeOf.title: Type
typeOf.description: video — extract a clip from a video file (default). image — use a static image letterboxed to output resolution.

file.title: File
file.description: Video file override (type=video, optional) or image path (type=image, required). Falls back to default_configuration.video_file when type=video.

timing.title: Timing
timing.description: [start, end] within the video file. Required when type=video; ignored when type=image.

TopicNorm.title: TopicNorm
TopicNorm.description: Duration reconciliation rules for this topic.

by.title: By
by.description: Which side sets the target duration: audio | video | fixed.

length.title: Length
length.description: Fixed target duration (MM:SS.mmm). Required when by=fixed.

audio.title: Audio
audio.description: Override audio normalization method for this topic.

video.title: Video
video.description: Override video normalization method for this topic.
